arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is set to leave Manchester United this month and West Ham have looked at a potential loan move with new boss Graham Potter facing a selection headache

arts.ttl: Reports of improved bid for Fulham’s Pereira are ‘completely false’
arts.sum: Marco Silva has insisted reports that Palmeiras have submitted an improved bid for Fulham midfielder Andreas Pereira are “completely false”. Fulham recently rejected an offer of around £16m from the Brazilian club and it was claimed that they had returned with another bid. “Completely false. Normally I don’t speak about this type of situation, but […] The post Reports of improved bid for Fulham’s Pereira are ‘completely false’ appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Fulham star could be sidelined until April
arts.sum: Fulham right-back Kenny Tete could be out until April. The Dutchman, 29, suffered a knee injury during the 2-2 draw at Liverpool on 14 December. arts.ttl: Celtic and Fulham consider €15m bid for Liverpool midfielder
arts.sum: Celtic and Fulham are among the clubs considering a bid to sign Liverpool midfielder Wataru Endo. The Japan international has struggled for minutes this season and has failed to start a Premier League game. A regular under Jurgen Klopp last season, he has lost his place to Ryan Gravenberch under new head coach Arne Slot.
